text: [Australian accent] <cite index="21-24,21-25">Researchers used AI to create a breakthrough stool test that detects 90% of colorectal cancers - no colonoscopy required. They mapped gut bacteria at unprecedented detail, revealing microbial patterns linked to cancer.</cite>
